name: MARRIOTT VACATIONS WORLDWIDE Corp
business: Marriott Vacations Worldwide is a global vacation company that offers vacation ownership, exchange, rental, and resort and property management services. It sells vacation ownership interests under licensed brands such as Marriott Vacation Club, Sheraton Vacation Club, Westin Vacation Club, Hyatt Vacation Club, and The Ritz-Carlton Club. Its Interval International subsidiary provides vacation ownership exchange services, and its Aqua-Aston business manages third-party resorts and hotels.
sellsTo: Marriott Bonvoy loyalty program members (nearly 271 million members)
World of Hyatt loyalty program members (approximately 63 million members)
Qualified consumers seeking vacation ownership or exchange products

exposures.sentence: Failure to maintain the integrity of internal or customer data or to protect our information systems from cyber-attacks could disrupt our business, damage our reputation, and subject us to costs, fines or lawsuits.
Our use of AI technologies may not be successful and may present business, compliance, and reputational risks.
Our results of operations can be adversely affected by labor shortages, turnover and labor cost increases.

tamClaims.claim: According to ARDA, sales in the U.S. market were approximately $10.5 billion in 2024.
